nasb.text: But not even Titus, who was with me, though he was a Greek, was compelled to be circumcised.

esv.text: But even Titus, who was with me, was not forced to be circumcised, though he was a Greek.

cnv.text: 與我同行的提多，雖然是希臘人，也沒有強迫他受割禮；

ccb.text: 跟我同去的提多虽然是希腊人，但没有人勉强他接受割礼。

csbs.text: 与我在一起的提多，虽然是希腊人，也没有被迫受割礼。
